error.email-exist: An account with this email already exists
error.user-not-verified: Please verify your email before signing in
error.account-locked: Your account is temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts. Please try again later
error.match-old-password: New password cannot be the same as the current password
error.no-password-set: No password set for this account. Use Google sign-in or reset your password
error.session-expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again
error.password-previously-used: This password was used recently. Please choose a different password
error.password-breached: This password has appeared in a known data breach. Please choose a stronger password

success.signup: Account created successfully. Please check your email to verify your account
success.forgot-password-token: If an account exists with this email, a password reset link has been sent
